CLINICAL AUTHORITY

Orthopedic Scholars & Clinicians

Our surgeons are fellowship-trained, hold academic seats, and participate in peer-reviewed clinical research to advance orthopedic care.

Dr. Sarah Jenkins

Sports Medicine
15+ Years Clinical Practice
Harvard Fellowship-Trained AOSSM

Dr. Arthur Pendelton

Spine Surgery
18+ Years Clinical Practice
Johns Hopkins Minimally Invasive NASS

Dr. Robert Chen

Joint Replacement
24+ Years Clinical Practice
Stanford Robotic Specialist AAOS Chief

Dr. Maya Lin

Hand & Wrist
12+ Years Clinical Practice
Yale Medical Microvascular ASSH Member

Dr. Elena Rostova

Pediatric Ortho
14+ Years Clinical Practice
Columbia Pediatric Scholar POSNA

Dr. Marcus Vance

Foot & Ankle
16+ Years Clinical Practice

Dr. Thomas Kelly

Shoulder & Elbow
17+ Years Clinical Practice
UPenn Rotator Cuff ASES Member

AURA ORTHOPEDICS

Premium skeletal health and movement restoration. Restoring vitality, strength, and life coordinates to active individuals.
